title: Verify mutual exclusivity with other experiments
description: Test that a user who is part of the Trial Corner cohort does not see other pre-trial or post-trial onboarding experiments.
preconditions: User is assigned to the Trial Corner experiment cohort
There are other active onboarding experiments

steps.description: 2. Navigate through the initial app experience

expected_result: The user sees the Trial Corner UI elements but is not exposed to any conflicting onboarding experiments.
